heading: Stranding or entanglement response agreements
label: 1421b Stranding or entanglement response agreements
notes: Amendments2022—, inserted “or entanglement” before “response” in section catchline.Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(1)Subsec. (a). , inserted “or entanglement” after “stranding”.Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(2)Subsec. (b)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(3)
amendments: Amendments2022—, inserted “or entanglement” before “response” in section catchline.Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(1)Subsec. (a). , inserted “or entanglement” after “stranding”.Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(2)Subsec. (b)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 117–263, § 10402(a)(3)

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may enter into an agreement under with any person to take marine mammals under in response to a stranding or entanglement.section 1382(c) of this titlesection 1379(h)(1) of this title
specify each person who is authorized to perform activities under the agreement;
specify any terms and conditions under which a person so specified may delegate that authority to another person; and
include a description of the data management and public outreach policy established under .section 1421a(f) of this title

children.heading: Review
children.label: c Review
children.text: The Secretary shall periodically review agreements under that are entered into pursuant to this subchapter, for performance adequacy and effectiveness.section 1382(c) of this title
